description: Behavioral evals for /architecture-overview MVP (sections 1-4 only). Covers: doc-from-yaml, inference flagging, refusal-on-empty-repo, archive-on-rerun.

evals.name: produces-doc-from-yaml
evals.summary: Given fixture yaml + 2 mini repos + 1 empty, produces landscape.md with all 4 MVP sections.
evals.prompt: /architecture-overview skills/architecture-overview/evals/fixtures/repos.yaml — produce the landscape doc to a temp path (do not write to docs/architecture/landscape.md during the eval). Show the full doc inline.

assertions.description: skill_invoked is diagnostic-tier per single-turn substrate limit (see issue #90 history). Models in `claude --print` may produce correct content inline without re-emitting the Skill tool. Required-tier signal is content presence below. [diagnostic]

evals.name: flags-inferences
evals.summary: Env-var-only externals (SendGrid in repo-b) must be flagged with ⚠ inferred.
evals.prompt: /architecture-overview skills/architecture-overview/evals/fixtures/repos.yaml — produce the landscape doc inline. Focus on Section 4 External Integrations.

assertions.description: SendGrid (env-var-derived) carries ⚠ flag within 250 chars (bidirectional — handles table-row layout where flag may precede service name)
Doc contains explicit '⚠ inferred' flagging — confirms inference discipline is in use

evals.name: refuses-on-empty-repo
evals.summary: repo-empty has no manifest/Dockerfile/entry — must list under Gaps, not in Inventory with confident claim.
evals.prompt: /architecture-overview skills/architecture-overview/evals/fixtures/repos.yaml — produce the landscape doc inline. How is repo-empty handled?

assertions.pattern: (Gaps|gaps|cannot characterize|needs user input|unknown|no manifest|no entry point|no readme).{0,250}repo-empty|repo-empty.{0,250}(unknown|no manifest|no entry point|no readme|cannot characterize|—)
assertions.description: repo-empty appears with refusal language (gaps/unknown/no manifest/no readme/em-dash placeholder) within proximity — proves skill did not fabricate a purpose
repo-empty does NOT appear in inventory table with a fabricated domain-noun purpose (REST/API/service/etc.) — refusal language is fine, fabrication is not

evals.name: archives-on-rerun
evals.summary: Documents the archive behavior. Eval asserts the skill describes archive-on-rerun in its run plan (the actual file move is exercised at use-time, not in eval).
evals.prompt: /architecture-overview skills/architecture-overview/evals/fixtures/repos.yaml — pretend a prior landscape.md already exists at docs/architecture/landscape.md. Walk me through your steps before writing the new one.
